# pangolin_resources (Data Source)

Retrieves the list of HTTP resources for the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pangolin_resources" "all" {}

output "resource_domains" {
  value = [for r in data.pangolin_resources.all.resources : r.full_domain]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `resources` (Attributes List) List of HTTP resources. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--resources))

<a id="nestedatt--resources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `resources`

Read-Only:

- `domain_id` (String) The domain ID.
- `full_domain` (String) The full domain.
- `id` (Number) The numeric resource ID.
- `name` (String) The resource name.
- `nice_id` (String) The human-readable resource ID.
- `subdomain` (String) The subdomain.
